creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
The original bug report no longer appears valid, and I'm considering this feedback timeout because it wasn't a proper diff patch and the reporter never addressed issues mentioned in Comment #3.

muxas, if you want to submit an updated, valid patch, please file a new bug report.

timp87, thank you for your efforts, but without a valid main remmina update patch, the update to plugins is redundant. Please consider filing a separate bug.
